rows.name: PAROXETINE
rows.description: Small molecule drug with a maximum clinical stage of Approval (across all indications), with an approval for depressive disorder and major depressive disorder and 18 investigational indications.
rows.openTargetsIdentityReviewRationale: Diognosis Paroxetine refers to the active parent molecule; Open Targets CHEMBL490 is the matching parent molecule. Salt and brand entities are intentionally not used for context import.
rows.openTargetsIdentityNote: Accepted parent-molecule context mapping; not a professional clinical evidence review.
